# Purpose

Automate accessibility verification across CI, local dev, and pre-release so WCAG 2.2 AA regressions cannot ship silently. Single-responsibility: a11y test pipeline.

# Inputs

- WCAG mapping from `@.cursor/skills/coi-ui-ux-design/SKILL.md`.
- Component contracts from `@.cursor/skills/coi-component-library-api/SKILL.md`.
- Tokens (contrast pairs) from `@.cursor/skills/coi-pro-design-tokens/SKILL.md`.
- E2E suite scaffold from `@.cursor/skills/coi-testing-strategy/SKILL.md`.

# Step-by-Step Workflow

1. Add unit-level a11y: `jest-axe` on every component (default render + each variant + each state).
2. Add integration-level: `@axe-core/playwright` smoke runs across critical user flows.
3. Add manual matrix: keyboard-only walkthrough script, screen-reader (VoiceOver, NVDA) test plan per release.
4. Contrast checks: token pairing matrix (text/bg pairs) validated against WCAG 2.2 AA (4.5:1 / 3:1).
5. Lint: `eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y` + `eslint-plugin-react-hooks` rules; fail CI on errors.
6. Storybook a11y addon for design-time checks; Loki/Chromatic for visual regressions.
7. Quarterly third-party audit (manual) for assistive tech that automation cannot cover.

# Validation & Metrics

- 100% of components have axe unit tests.
- E2E flows pass axe with zero serious/critical violations.
- Contrast pair matrix has zero failures or documented exceptions.
- Keyboard-only walkthrough completes every critical flow.
- Lint runs in pre-commit and CI.

# Output Format

- `docs/core/required/sdd/A11Y_AUTOMATION.md` (test matrix, tools, thresholds).
- `jest-axe` setup snippet.
- `@axe-core/playwright` config snippet.
- Manual SR + keyboard test scripts.
- Quarterly audit log.

# Integration Hooks

- `/SCAN a11y` runs the full pipeline.
- `/FIX` consumes axe reports for triage.
- Pairs with `@.cursor/skills/coi-ui-ux-design/SKILL.md`, `@.cursor/skills/coi-component-library-api/SKILL.md`, `@.cursor/skills/coi-testing-strategy/SKILL.md`.
- Enforces `[.cursor/rules/design-dev-gates.mdc](.cursor/rules/design-dev-gates.mdc)` Gate 6.

# Anti-Patterns

- "We'll do an audit at the end" with no automation in CI.
- Suppressing axe rules without a documented justification.
- Reading-only screen reader testing (skipping operating with focus + form modes).
- Contrast guesses; not validating each token pair.
- Marking violations "won't fix" without product approval and tracked exception.

# External Reference

- axe-core (https://github.com/dequelabs/axe-core) — current.
- jest-axe (https://github.com/nickcolley/jest-axe) — current.
- @axe-core/playwright (https://www.npmjs.com/package/@axe-core/playwright) — current.
- WCAG 2.2 (https://www.w3.org/TR/WCAG22/) — current.
- WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices 1.2+ (current).
- Closest skills.sh/official analog: a11y-automation / accessibility-testing.
